main.description: The player's reputation or standing with a faction, guild, or character, for use in a play record's `state` array. At least one of `value` or `tier` should be set. Cardinality: keyed — unique per ($type, id); writers upsert by `id`.

id.description: Stable, game-defined identifier for the faction or entity this standing is with. Language-independent and consistent across play-throughs & game versions.

name.description: Human-readable display name in the locale active at write time. Optional, but recommended so renderers without a localised mapping of `id` can fall back to displaying this.

value.description: Numeric standing, when the game tracks one. Higher should mean better standing where possible.

tier.description: Stable identifier of the named reputation tier, when the game uses them (eg. `honored`, `revered`).

items.description: Game-specific lexicons that can hold additional information about this standing.
